Login.title: Welcome to Fief
Login.description: Enter your API key to manage your DNS records

Admin.title: Admin Dashboard
Admin.label: Label
Admin.newKeyDescription: Copy this key now. It will not be shown again.

Docs.title: API Documentation
Docs.description: Learn how to manage your DNS records programmatically using the Fief REST API.
Docs.authDescription: All API requests require an API key passed in the `Authorization` header as a Bearer token.
Docs.listRecordsDesc: Retrieve all DNS records associated with your subdomain path.
Docs.setRecordDesc: Create or update a DNS record. Note that NameCheap's API is replacement-based; Fief handles the fetch-patch-push cycle for you.
Docs.deleteRecordDesc: Remove a specific DNS record by host and type.
